laticrete-305.name: LATICRETE 305
laticrete-305.description: Cement-based tile adhesive for internal floor and wall ceramic/vitrified tile installation. Economic option in the LATICRETE range. Good bonding to common substrates.

laticrete-315.name: LATICRETE 315
laticrete-315.description: Single-component, polymer-modified adhesive for interior floor and wall installations and external floor installations. Bonds to concrete, cement mortar beds, brick masonry, existing ceramic tiles, vitrified tiles. Ideal for tile-on-tile bathroom tiling.

coverage.unit: m² per 20 kg bag (6 mm notch)

laticrete-325-plus.name: LATICRETE 325 PLUS
laticrete-325-plus.description: Premium polymer-modified tile adhesive with smooth and creamy consistency, long open time, water and heat resistance. Ready to use — just mix with water. For exterior floors and interior floors/walls.

coverage.unit: m² per 20 kg bag (6×6 mm square notch)

laticrete-335-premium-white.name: LATICRETE 335 PREMIUM WHITE
laticrete-335-premium-white.description: Polymer-modified flexible cement-based thin-set adhesive for interior ceramics, porcelain, mosaic and natural stone. Interior/exterior, floor/wall. Water and shock resistant. Suitable for swimming pools, washrooms, large-format tiles.
laticrete-335-premium-white.classification: C2TES1 (EN 12004 / EN 12002) / ANSI A118.4 shear bond
application_areas: Large-format porcelain tiles on walls and floors
External tile installations with thermal stress

laticrete-254-platinum.name: LATICRETE 254 PLATINUM
laticrete-254-platinum.description: Multipurpose, one-step thin-set mortar mixed with water. Factory prepared to the highest quality. Lightweight, smooth creamy formula with incredible bond strength. Equipped with Microban antimicrobial technology.
laticrete-254-platinum.mix_ratio: 5.2 L water per 22.7 kg (5.5 qt per 50 lb)

laticrete-latapoxy-300.name: LATAPOXY 300
laticrete-latapoxy-300.description: 100% solids epoxy adhesive for installation of ceramic tile, stone, thin brick, and thin glass tile. Ultimate adhesion on difficult or unusual substrates (metal, mirror-mesh mosaics, fiberglass, plastic laminates, plywood). Chemical and water resistant.

laticrete-permacolor.name: PERMACOLOR
laticrete-permacolor.description: High-performance cement grout with advanced non-shading colour-consistency technology. Fast-setting, stain-resistant, anti-efflorescence. For joints up to 12 mm wide.
laticrete-permacolor.classification: CG2 WA (EN 13888) / ANSI A118.7 high-performance cement grout

laticrete-spectralock.name: SPECTRALOCK
laticrete-spectralock.description: High-performance epoxy grout. Stain-resistant, colour-consistent, easy to clean. Premium grout for interior and exterior tiling with uniform colour and chemical resistance. Water-cleanable during the installation window.
laticrete-spectralock.classification: RG (EN 13888) / ANSI A118.3 — reactive resin grout

laticrete-latascreed-pm-30.name: LATASCREED PM-30
laticrete-latascreed-pm-30.description: Ready-to-use polymer-modified semi-dry screeding mix. Blend of Portland cement, polymer, fibres, and graded fillers. Produces quality screed with controlled shrinkage and high mechanical strength for early installation.
application_areas: Under ceramic, natural stone, resilient flooring, wood

laticrete-aqua-barrier.name: AQUA BARRIER
laticrete-aqua-barrier.description: Two-part polymer-modified cementitious waterproof slurry (liquid polymer + cement-based powder). Cures to a flexible elastomeric membrane. For concrete/masonry water-retaining structures, balconies, terraces, swimming pools (with AQUA BARRIER NET).
laticrete-aqua-barrier.classification: EN 14891 CM P / ASTM D751 / EN 12390-8
application_areas: Balconies, terraces, swimming pools (with NET reinforcement)
laticrete-aqua-barrier.notes: Reinforce with WPM TAPE across construction joints, bends, and hairline cracks
